modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Incorrect course name listed in USD online bookstore.

full_description_text: The instructor has reported that the name of their class is not correct in the online bookstore at usd.textbookx.com. This issue is causing confusion for students trying to find the right course materials. The instructor is seeking assistance to have the course name updated to reflect the accurate title. It is important to resolve this to ensure students have access to the correct information.
